properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a stranger in town He's given sight to the blind He is a great emancipator He turns water to wine

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He even healed the sick Who were bound by disease What manner of man is this whose voice can control the seas

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Some say He is great I am that prophets spoke of Some even say He's Emanuel, the Son of God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: This stranger, stranger, stranger from Galilee The man from Galilee…

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Do you know, do you know, do you know the man? Do you know, do you know, do you know the man? Do you know, do you know, do you know the man? Do you know, do you know, do you know the man?

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: What a man? Who's the man? He's the man? Jesus the man!

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Yes I know, yes I know, yes I know the man
